# Dominus Foundry LLC
> Technology holding company building AI-powered vertical SaaS for traditional industries. Based in Albuquerque, New Mexico.

## About
Dominus Foundry LLC is a Wyoming Series LLC that builds and operates AI-backed software systems for traditional businesses. The company operates a federated multi-product architecture where each vertical gets a purpose-built "kernel" optimized for its industry.

## Flagship Product
- Forge (https://buildwithforge.app): AI operating system for commercial installation contractors. Combines CRM, LiDAR spatial intelligence, compliance automation, payroll, and communication intelligence. 10 provisional patents filed.

## Other Products
- Foundry Voice Concierge: AI voice assistant for small business phone systems
- InvoiceFlow: Automated invoicing for service businesses

## Company Details
- Structure: Wyoming Series LLC
- Location: Albuquerque, New Mexico
- Founded by: Mark Lord
- Philosophy: Multi-generational family business ("Fide et Familia")
- Contact: foundry@dominusfoundry.com | (866) 710-3313
